Package com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    PBitSet
    A growable native bitset over 64-bit words; reads past the end are false.
    PBloomFilter
    A fixed-size native Bloom filter; mightContain can return false positives but never false negatives.
    PBoolSet
    A bool set over a single-word bitmap.
    PByteSet
    A byte set over a fixed 256-bit direct-indexed bitmap.
    PCharSet
    A char set over a fixed 8 KB direct-indexed bitmap.
    PDoubleSet
    A double set over bit patterns in a PLongSet; NaNs collapse to one element, -0.0 and 0.0 stay distinct.
    PFloatSet
    A float set over bit patterns in a PIntSet; NaNs collapse to one element, -0.0 and 0.0 stay distinct.
    PIntSet
    A growable native int hash set with open addressing and backward-shift deletion.
    PLongSet
    A growable native long hash set with open addressing and backward-shift deletion.
    PShortSet
    A short set over a fixed 8 KB direct-indexed bitmap.
